extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked inside 10km on the Sarnano Sasotetto summit finish, distanced WOODS Michael and won solo by 35 seconds, taking race lead.
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon attacked before final 3km where gradient eases, exploiting steeper lower slopes rather than false-flat finish.
VLASOV Aleksandr abandoned WOODS Michael to chase YATES alone, revealing NTT willingness to sacrifice race leader for GC.
BRAMBILLA Gianluca and MASNADA Fausto attacked early to soften field before YATES moved, classic Mitchelton team setup.
THOMAS Geraint sat on WOODS Michael's wheel refusing to pace, banking on bonus seconds over limiting losses.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked with enough margin that final 3km gradient ease didn't compromise advantage, superior pacing judgment
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: cracked when VLASOV attacked, couldn't follow any accelerations despite holding race lead with 10km remaining
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: strong enough to leave race leader and finish fourth at 49 seconds, prioritized own GC over team duty
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: tactically refused to work for WOODS, secured 4 bonus seconds for second place, classic veteran positioning
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: positive: limited losses to 35 seconds after initial difficulty, strong final 3km to secure podium and second overall
rider_signals.BRAMBILLA Gianluca: neutral: early attack designed to soften field for YATES, team role rather than personal ambition
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: neutral: covered BRAMBILLA attack early to disrupt rivals, finished sixth showing depth but not podium threat
